sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_group_array (id UInt32, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT groupArrayLast(2)(value) AS last_values FROM test_group_array;
UPDATE test_group_array SET value = value + 5 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, groupArrayLast(1)(value) AS last_value FROM test_group_array GROUP BY id;
